channel.title: AI Security on Rotational Labs
channel.description: Recent content in AI Security on Rotational Labs

item.title: Prompt Injection, Jailbreaking, and the Risk Every AI Deployment Inherits
item.description: Most AI conversations focus on productivity. Fewer focus on what happens when that same AI becomes a doorway into your systems. AI security can sound abstract until it’s tied to business risk. Two misunderstood threats illustrate the double-edged nature of AI: the same capability that makes it useful is what makes it exploitable.
